programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own
programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: True Lies
programme.desc: It took a murder victim's 9 year-old child, notations in a diary, and forensic psychology to determine which forensic evidence was important and which to ignore.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Mile High Mischief
programme.desc: A hostile points battle becomes even more intense as drivers struggle to adjust to the 'mile high' altitude at Colorado's Bandimere Speedway.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Texas' Last Stand
programme.desc: The points race has heated up to an all-time high and the racers are willing to do anything to get ahead. Ryan still leads in points but Lizzy and Kye are hot on his heels. Meanwhile, Team Texas sees their chances of winning slip further out of reach.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Callout Karma
programme.desc: Round two hits the racers at a time when every decision can either make or break them. Points leader Ryan Martin becomes painfully aware of the consequences of his decisions when it matters most.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fireball Flameout
programme.desc: With two races left in the season, drivers are hustling to rack up points. On the brink of another championship, Ryan feels the pressure. Team NOLA forms an unexpected alliance in an attempt to increase their chances of winning an NPK trophy.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Don't Choke
programme.desc: Ryan rolls into the final event at the top of the leaderboard and with each round worth double points, the pressure is on to not let the elusive NPK trophy slip away for a third time. Kye, Lizzy and Scott do everything in their power to derail him.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: The racers are in South Carolina. As the weather improves, the racers turn it up to win the fastest semi-finals and finals the series has ever seen.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Dunn and Dunn
programme.desc: Chuck, Birdman, and Ryan Martin continue to fight for points.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Dead Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores the stories behind a millionaire's disappearance in Malaysia, a celebration of death in Bolivia and history's most feared prison in French Guiana.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Angels, Fire and Doll Spirits
programme.desc: Josh Gates shines a light on the death of demoness in India, a citywide inferno in a Spanish town and an island haunted by the spirits of dolls.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: City of Stone
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores legendary locations across the globe, from an ancient city carved deep into a canyon in the Jordanian desert to a legendary pirate paradise near Madagascar.

programme.title: The Tidewater Boats Elite Redfish Series: The Tidewater Boats Championship, South Padre Island, TX
programme.desc: The Tidewater Boats Championship takes place, once again in beautiful South Padre Island Texas. The field of 25 Check It Stik Series top point getters join the 25 automatic berth qualifiers from two Atlas All Star Tour Opens.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Ryan Heard
programme.desc: U.S. Army veteran, wildlife firefighter, and police officer, Ryan Heard, finds the outdoors the best form of therapy since coming home from Iraq where he stepped on an IED.

programme.title: The RVers: RV Tires
programme.desc: More Important Than You Think; Touring Alaska; On-The-Road: RV Geeks' Peter and John.

programme.title: The Given Right: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Mark chases an old warrior known as the Enchanted 9 in his home state of Iowa.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: 90 Day Challenge
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns is on a quest to grow a million-dollar business from scratch with just $100 in ninety-days. He also gives tips on how to build a successful business.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Billionaire Glenn Sterns hits a breaking point, and attempts a rebound and shares advice on starting a business.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Going All In
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns goes all in, gambling all the money he's won so far. As a successful businessman, he knows that taking a risk can be a recipe for success.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Doubling Down
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns fights to keep his million-dollar dream alive with a bold plan to expand his business, but risks losing his start-up funds. But building a business requires ingenuity and determination, as he has learned from his struggles and successes.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Underdog Millionaire
programme.desc: Glenn is sent scrambling after losing a critical deal. The underdogs work together to flip a house that could save the business and change their lives. Along the way, Glenn offers tips for rebuilding a business.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Unmasked
programme.desc: The Underdog BBQ team races to prepare for their opening day, only to have work come to halt when Glenn accidentally reveals his true identity. Building a successful business can involve some stumbles, Glenn advises.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: New Year, New Money: Make or Break
programme.desc: The Underdog BBQ team's plans for their big debut go up in flames, threatening Glenn's chances for success. Glenn battles to save the company, sharing his tips for sustaining a business along the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: No Room for Compromise
programme.desc: Petite bride Christine is looking for a gown to match her '20s theme-inspired wedding. Stefanny wants a sexy dress to wear on her big day, but her parents have other ideas. Valentina returns for her fitting to add a personal touch to her gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown Worth the Trip
programme.desc: With Alaska coming up short on dress options, Liz has flown 4,000 miles and must find something. Norwegian Amanda has exhausted all options in Europe, with high hopes for the salon. After losing 18 pounds, Danielle worries her gown won't show her curves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: When in Doubt, Customize
programme.desc: Host Courtney Cason only wants a Mark Zunino gown, and she gets a huge surprise at Kleinfeld. Zabrina looks for an extravagant ball gown for her Near Year's Eve wedding, and Cheryl is nervous to try on her custom dress because she has never seen it.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sample Sale Madness!
programme.desc: It's shopping chaos at Kleinfeld's blow-out sale! Danielle and Kathryn want the same gown- but there's only one and Jessica is in search of one very specific dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Challenge after Challenge
programme.desc: Rebekah is a survivor of the Boston Marathon bombings, and she has just one month to find a dress for her dream wedding. Tall bride Gianna needs a gown with extra length, but she has high expectations for the 'once-in-a-lifetime' dress she envisions.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Persia has flown from L.A. in search of a $14K Pnina dress, but no one can locate it. Katrice's two brothers, NFL stars Thomas and Julius Jones, secretly plan to purchase her gown. Fitting bride Brittany is shocked by an unwanted addition to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy Just Showed You the Door!
programme.desc: Twins Marlo and Margo are back, but this time, Marlo is the bride. Karma can be cruel as Margo's sass is unleashed and family drama further escalates when a major secret is revealed. Bride Val needs a gown for her icy wedding atop an Alaskan glacier.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Darcey's Continuing Journey
programme.desc: Take a look back at Darcey's journey.

programme.title: Unpolished: All Shook Up
programme.desc: Lexi finally spills what's been bothering her about Matt all of these years, and a divide forms in the family. Bria and Matt isolate themselves while Lexi throws herself into work with a 3-D nail build that challenges her skills.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Darcey's Continuing Journey
programme.desc: Take a look back at Darcey's journey.

programme.title: Unpolished: All Shook Up
programme.desc: Lexi finally spills what's been bothering her about Matt all of these years, and a divide forms in the family. Bria and Matt isolate themselves while Lexi throws herself into work with a 3-D nail build that challenges her skills.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 10 Years Later and Busier Than Ever!
programme.desc: Brides and viewers have been 'saying yes' for 10 incredible years. When Grammy-nominated rocker Elle King arrives, Randy and consultant Shay have a dress disagreement. Then, bride Lisa needs a gown for a wedding with dolphins.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Shay Way
programme.desc: Jamiee and her fiancée Lisa are shopping together. To keep the brides from seeing their final looks, the consultants plan a wild surprise. Can wedding planner Michelle let go and enjoy being the bride? Shay confronts Randy about the elephant in the room.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: More, More, More!
programme.desc: Rasha needs a huge ball gown that will wow all 700 guests at her wedding. Melissa's dad has a special surprise for her when she wants more bling. Burcu needs a personal touch from Pnina when she finds her dress to be lacking in sparkle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: It Fits, She Scores!
programme.desc: Kristi is marrying a pro-baseball pitcher and is looking for a glitzy dress to compliment her luxurious lifestyle. Sports fan Jenna wants a dress that will knock it out of the park. Jennifer hopes that her boss will help her find the dress of her dreams.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: For His Consideration
programme.desc: Fashionista Britanny shops with her beloved uncle, who insists her dress has lots of sparkle. Nicole is an excited daddy's girl whose dad is just as delighted and desperate to please. Andrea wants a fancy lace gown for her manor wedding in Michigan.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Kleinfeld Family Affair
programme.desc: Carolina is an editor for 'Say Yes' and is seeking the Kleinfeld experience first-hand. Danielle, close family friend of Dorothy, has a very special surprise in store. Consultant Katie is delighted to turn customer for the day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Til Dress Do Us Part
programme.desc: After losing 100 pounds, Stephanie wants to show off her new curves in a sexy wedding dress. Christine is looking for a traditional white gown to wear for her vow renewal ceremony. In for her fitting, Akisha is worried her dress won't impress her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Seal of Approval
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to look like a 'sex kitten' on her big day, but her mom wishes for something modest. Second-time bride Lisa's mother is very opinionated about her dress choices. Elizabeth fears her mom won't approve the $13K gown she bought without her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Tight, Strapless and Sexy!
programme.desc: Whytnee wants a sexy dress to suit her vixen image, Carla wants to show more skin than her mother would like, and 52-years-young Dina is ready to try on her gown, saying it will fit right if it fits tight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I've Stalked This Dress on Instagram
programme.desc: Chic designer Hayley Paige is getting married and makes three one-of-a-kind dresses for her big day. Bride Elisabeth comes to Kleinfeld with one goal: to buy her dream Hayley Paige gown. LaKesha, a superfan of designer Lazaro, gets a shock at the salon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm Not the Size of a Hanger!
programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends in the quest to find the perfect glamorous gown. Jen is having a beer-themed wedding, but wants her dress to be more traditional. Katie worries her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That Looks Like a Torture Device
programme.desc: Bridget's feelings about the perfect dress for her wedding to pro snowboarder Scott Lago get turned upside-down by her opinionated entourage. Meanwhile, new mom Karyssa wants a dress with lots of coverage and Lauren hopes she fits into her gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is My Fiancé...and This Is His Wife!
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé - and his wife. Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the latest runway. Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Hell Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: It's a family affair as the sister of star NBA player Stephen Curry hunts for her dream wedding dress. Cami Lee is back with her over the top mom who will stop at nothing to make sure Cami doesn't get a black dress, including hunting Randy down for help.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Karina's Story
programme.desc: Unable to stand for more than a short period of time, Karina's weight has placed a burden on her parents and driven a wedge between her and her sister.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Alicia's Story
programme.desc: A devoted girlfriend and loving aunt, Alicia is all smiles and laughter on the outside, but on the inside she is terrified that her addiction to food will kill her before she can marry her long-time love or watch her nieces grow up.

programme.title: Five Day Biz Fix: Salon Sensation

programme.title: The Loud House: Present Tense/ Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids behave, so she averts any disasters.

programme.title: The Loud House: Predict Ability / Driving Ambition
programme.desc: Lincoln fears he's predictable, so vows to change up his routine. Then, Lori gets the yips when she learns the golf coach from her dream college is coming to see her play.

programme.title: The Loud House: 11 Louds a Leapin'
programme.desc: The Louds are getting ready for Christmas, when the unthinkable happens to Lincoln; his sled goes in the neighbour's yard. Lincoln and Clyde attempt to pull off a sled-rescue-mission and end up finding secrets about Mr. Grouse.

programme.title: The Loud House: Power Play With the Casagrandes/ Room for Improvement With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage. Desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it from the other tenants.

programme.title: The Loud House: Snow Way Out/ Snow Way Down
programme.desc: Despite the heavy snowfall, Lana convinces the kids to go to the Burpin' Burger to meet her racecar driving hero. Lincoln goes on vacation with Clyde and realizes just how overprotective Clyde's dads are.

programme.title: Top Elf: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Pete Wentz joins Santa and Mrs. Claus to judge the final three elf’s. This week, the contestants are challenged with making over Santa's sleigh.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Holiday Punch

programme.title: Henry Danger: Christmas Danger
programme.desc: When Captain Man gets arrested for committing a petty crime, he is forced to spend Christmas in jail. Henry and Charlotte must try to help Captain Man have a good Christmas in jail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It's a SpongeBob Christmas!
programme.desc: Plankton gets all of Bikini Bottom's residents on Santa's 'naughty' list.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Masterpiece/ Whelk Attack

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Finds Out

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Finds Out

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Morning After

programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help get Jill sober again, and Christy's boyfriend is less than understanding when it ruins his birthday weekend.

programme.title: Mom: Eight Cats and the Hat Show

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It's a SpongeBob Christmas!
programme.desc: Plankton gets all of Bikini Bottom's residents on Santa's 'naughty' list.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Hankering/ Plankton's Old Chum
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has a secret taste for something surprising. Plankton tricks SpongeBob into hiding his rotten chum.

programme.desc: When Sandy tells the residents of Bikini Bottom about Christmas, SpongeBob wants to bring the holiday to the town. His enthusiasm is infectious, but everyone blames SpongeBob when Santa is a no show on Christmas morning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goons on the Moon
programme.desc: Sandy takes her 'Science Scout' troop on a trip to the moon.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts.

programme.desc: Randy's boardwalk memorabilia collection fills a 20,000 square foot building and numerous tractor trailers. Vicki's hoarding is breaking up her family.

programme.title: Hoarders: Roy/ Loretta
programme.desc: Roy is facing $20 million in fines from the county for hoarding hundreds of vehicles on his property. After being robbed at gunpoint, Loretta started to hoard everything in her home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Norman/ Linda
programme.desc: Paramedics rushing to save a woman's life lose precious time when they're forced to climb over the hoard in Norman's house. Since Linda's husband died 10 years ago, she's been adding to a hoard that has now spiralled out of control.

programme.desc: Barbara trolls for stuff in dumpsters while her hoarded home sits in a million-dollar neighbourhood where the neighbours look on in disgust. Fred and Mary live in a house filled with cobwebs and cockroaches.

programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Birds and the Bees

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Over-Grooming Situation

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor

programme.desc: Danny gets started on a project that he's been waiting a long time to tackle, a 1971 Chevy C10 Pick Up. Later, Danny's bandmate Stoney gets in a fender bender and its Danny to the rescue.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Drive: Back in Time
programme.desc: Two brothers want to surprise their dad with the ultimate car guy gift: a fully restored 1957 Special Edition T-Bird that's been sitting in the family's pasture for many years. Mike and Ryan find an unusual car collector with some very unusual rides.

programme.title: American Pickers: Cowboys and Cobwebs

programme.title: American Pickers: The Einstein Gamble

programme.title: American Pickers: Can't Catch a Break

programme.desc: As the holidays begin, fire fighters respond to a house fire and make a gruesome discovery. Three people have been shot dead inside. A nationwide manhunt takes authorities through Christmas, as they pursue the heavily armed murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Rampage
programme.desc: Two days after Christmas a mass shooting terrorizes a small town. After killing two people and wounding many more the gunman is taken into custody. When police search for answers they uncover the worst family massacre in US history.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: A Christmas Massacre
programme.desc: The Ortega family’s annual Christmas Eve party is destroyed when a man dressed as Santa, wielding handguns and a homemade flame-thrower, opens fire. Detectives are led down a terrifying path that leads them to a sociopath.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Heartbreak
programme.desc: A beloved couple is found murdered inside their home on Christmas morning. All that's left behind is a single palm print. Investigators work tirelessly to match the print to a suspect, until a letter from prison takes the case on an unexpected course.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Carrs
programme.desc: The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen. The reign of terror by the brothers is later known as the 'Wichita Massacre.'

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Lewis and Machuca
programme.desc: In the summer of 1991, a pair of half-siblings creates panic across southern California when they embark on a spree of random crimes of the worst kind, targeting people out doing everyday tasks.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Brileys
programme.desc: Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count. Even after their apprehension, these brothers prove difficult to contain.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Skeptic
programme.desc: Lisa unearths a skeleton in the meadow where a new mega-mall is being constructed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Realty Bites
programme.desc: Marge is tired of working around the house and decides to pursue a real estate career.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Miracle on Evergreen Terrace
programme.desc: When Bart wakes up early on Christmas morning to play with his presents, he accidentally burns down the family's Christmas tree and ruins all the gifts. To cover his tracks, he buries the evidence in the yard and tells the family he saw a burglar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All Singing, All Dancing
programme.desc: Homer sings the blues when he realizes that a 'shoot'em-up' movie is really a musical. The rest of the family uses flashbacks to remind him about how many times he and others Springfield residents have broken into song and dance.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Carney
programme.desc: Homer invites carnies to live with his family, but they steal the Simpsons' home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Joy of Sect

programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The polar regions experience the planet's most extreme seasons and are home to some of its most surprising animal behaviours. Polar bears search and fight for mates, penguins surf and orcas hunt collaboratively.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Madagascar: Land of Heat and Dust
programme.desc: Some of the strategies for survival in Madagascar's dry south are ingenious.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter
programme.desc: There is no greater challenge for life than winter in the Polar Regions. As temperatures plummet to 70 degrees below zero Fahrenheit, witness the greatest test of survival on the planet.

programme.desc: When seven inmates at a Texas prison successfully escape two weeks before Christmas, they go on a crime spree that ends in one police officer dead and a showdown with US Marshals.

programme.title: Nightmare Christmas
programme.desc: A naughty husband pays the price for opening his gifts five days early. Then, a Christmas Day caper sends a congregation into chaos when greedy Grinches make off with the church donations.

programme.title: The Nightmare After Christmas
programme.desc: Charismatic businessman George Jodoin is found dead in the little town of Auburn, New Hampshire. Suspicion looms amongst of small group of friends as detectives try to get to the bottom of the case.

programme.title: Betrayed: Motel Hell
programme.desc: Driven by youth, music, and her faith, Janet Chandler has dreams and aspirations of a life much larger than the small Midwestern town where she grew up. Sadly, those dreams are cut short when she's betrayed in the most horrific way possible.

programme.title: Betrayed: No Escape
programme.desc: Susan Smith, a big dreamer stuck in a rural town, becomes an FBI informant to protect her kids from her jealous husband's criminal friends… but her desire to do the right thing brings hellish consequences.

programme.title: Betrayed: Dancing with Death
programme.desc: Janet Walsh is a young divorcée enjoying the single life, celebrating her freedom with a wild girls' night out at the local disco… and when she's found dead the next morning, it takes a determined officer 35 years to bring her murder to justice.

programme.title: Betrayed: Keep Your Friends Close…
programme.desc: 32-year-old Anna Lisa Raymundo seems to have it all a skyrocketing career, a beautiful home and a loving boyfriend. But a secret betrayal cuts her dreams of a family short.

programme.title: Betrayed: Hells Bells
programme.desc: Rhonda Smith is a beautiful, single woman who relies on the kindness of strangers at her new church to make her way in the world - until one of them strays from the path of righteousness and betrays her.

programme.title: Betrayed: Welcome to the Murderhood
programme.desc: 40-year-old Priscilla Strole is looking for a fresh start when she and her teenage son Kyle move to the small town of Fairfield, California. Little does she know, new beginnings lead to her untimely end.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Cathy Stroup is a no-nonsense Irish mom who knows what her family needs to survive. But the question is- how will she survive them?

programme.title: Betrayed: Pretty in Black
programme.desc: Kelly Bullwinkle is a 17-year-old desperate to find her place among the students of her Southern California high school. When a secret affair with her friend's boyfriend goes wrong, Kelly is given one final lesson in death.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blinded by Betrayal
programme.desc: Yelena Zakin's dream life is upturned by her husband Andrew's interest in his new, scheming secretary, her strange fiancé, and Andrew's ambitious protégé. For Yelena, it's a lethal combination.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: The Mob Rat: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Mike meets a woman who needs help tackling projects that have accumulated since her husband passed 10 years ago. At The Half Done House, Sherry teaches the apprentices as they frame out the living room's focal point: a show-stopping fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Mike shocks the owner of the 'twice done house' when he discovers mold in her attic. Then, the exterior of the half done house gets a major facelift while Sherry and designer Kimm shop for quartz for the bathroom and fireplace.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True
programme.desc: The twice done house's troublesome fence, windows and caulking are done right for the first time, and Michael brings the homeowner over to show her the progress. Meanwhile, the half done house becomes the fully done house and the family is welcomed home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny House on a Lake
programme.desc: The Busbys have been living off-the-grid for two years already and want to take it to the next level. They build a super-efficient tiny house in northwestern Montana. Surrounded by stunning views, they'll build it all by hand.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Egg Feeder Barn Doors
programme.desc: Bug and the gang are tasked with one of the most dangerous salvage projects to date: bringing down a structure without damaging the building it's attached to.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former Dixie Furniture Plant
programme.desc: The team travel to a vacant furniture plant in Lexington, NC, where they work in near-darkness salvaging conveyor belts, fire doors, veneer molds, factory carts, and industrial lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former United Methodist Church
programme.desc: The crew head to Laurel, Delaware to salvage what they can from a former Methodist church that fell victim to water damage. The team removes pews, a bronze bell, and a greenhouse skylight before heading back to the shop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lerner House
programme.desc: The crew travels to Orange, VA to salvage a 1930s brick mansion, including its columns and windows. Mike and Robert return General George C. Marshall's door to the Virginia Military Institute. Tay and Mike build a coffee table from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Navy Seal Boat
programme.desc: The Dawgs travel to a shipyard in Norfolk, VA, to salvage a boat once used for Navy SEAL insertions. The team manage to salvage some key items, but their energy and patience is tested once they realize the boat won't fit on the trailer.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Parkville Farmhouse
programme.desc: The team heads to Parkville, MD, to salvage a classic farmhouse. They remove steel from the front porch, doors, and windows from the outside while inside they work to remove radiators, banisters and wainscotting.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peacock Salem Cleaners
programme.desc: The Dawgs head to Salem, VA to salvage the old Salem Peacock Cleaners. The 100-year-old building is filled with antique laundromat parts.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Ludwig Mansion
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage returns to the Ludwig mansion in Pennsylvania to get what they left behind from the first salvage. This time they concentrate on the outside including the roof tiles, windows, and the boiler room.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Storybook Style House
programme.desc: Black Dog Salvage travels south to Winston Salem, North Carolina to save what they can from this storybook style home in two days. They get some unique chandeliers, sinks, and windows from this Robert Byrd house.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Trinity Lutheran Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Greencastle, PA, to salvage an old church that is being restored for a physical therapy office. The team struggles to figure out the best way to remove the windows, salvage the large bell and execute an idea for a console.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Victorian Free Classic House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs return to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage another home before it gets demolished. The house has some great Eastlake hardware worth salvaging as well as Majorca tile, mantles and pocket doors.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Victorian Home
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Hot Springs, VA, to salvage mantles, cabinets, sinks and a round window from a late Victorian-style home.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro, VA, to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. Robert is determined to redeem himself from last season's bowling fiasco.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: The Build Begins
programme.desc: After years spent traveling and working around the globe, Jon and Etta Smith are settling down with their 18-month-old daughter, Syndi. In one of the most remote corners of northwestern Montana, they are building a home and bison ranch off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: The Race Against Winter
programme.desc: Jon and Etta Smith's build is under way, and they're working to balance ranch and build duties. In Montana's northwest, they have little time to waste, winter is severe, and it's coming fast.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: The Bison Comes Home
programme.desc: Jon and Etta are in a race against time on their Montana house build, but it's not just the house that has them working around the clock: they're also building a bison ranch from the ground up.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: Montana Time
programme.desc: Jon and Etta Smith have built their off-the-grid house from the foundation up to the roof, but this late into the winter, they're forced to deal with bitter cold and high winds every day.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: Teamwork Makes the Dream Work
programme.desc: In a mad dash to finish the exterior of their house before another big Montana storm hits, Jon and Etta's interior work has been put on hold. With cold temperatures and little daylight to work with, every baby step they make is a victory in its own right.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sky Ranch: Dreams Become Reality
programme.desc: After construction delays pushed construction into the dead of winter, Jon and Etta Smith are nearing the end of the build. The finishing touches, including the custom stone fireplace, solar panels, and furniture are put into place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back. A prank call by Alvin gets out of hand when the person on the other end of the line vows to track him down.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Temporary Mom/ Tee Fore Two
programme.desc: When the boys get stuck with Miss Miller as a babysitter, they each take a crack at finding a replacement. Alvin volunteers to caddy a charity golf tournament and surprisingly gets paired up with Miss Smith.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Cubs and Robbers/ Billy the Bug
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous ‘Cubby the Cop’ balloon on the city. Then, Fire Chief McCloud accidently buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Sky Police/ Father's Day Parade
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtledega Nights: The Ballad of Rat Man/ The Ancient Art of Ninja Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Splinter enters the Turtle Tank in a demolition derby. And, Splinter teaches his sons the Art of Ninja Concealment.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: War and Pizza/ Newsworthy
programme.desc: The Turtles help April throw a not-so-happy birthday party. An anchor man turned mutant-worm used to report the news, now he's making headline.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Stuck on You/ Al Be Back
programme.desc: After an unfortunate “glue” accident, the Turtles have to fight a whole host of villains. The Turtles’ first public musical gig is interrupted by Albearto and his animatronic army.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Gumbus/ Mrs. Cuddles
programme.desc: Leo, Mikey and April investigate a mysterious specter that haunts a themed supermarket./ April and the brothers make Raph face his greatest fear… an adorable kids’ TV show bunny.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Driven to Tears/ Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Sponge Bob fails his driver's test again, Pat asks them to prove the test can be passed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Student Starfish/ Clams
programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter/ Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally gets a splinter, but he's afraid Mr. Krabs will send him home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boating Buddies/ Krabby Kronicle
programme.desc: Squidward is forced to attend Boating School with SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward/ Spongehenge
programme.desc: SpongeBob slams the door in Squidward's face; Squidward gets surgery and becomes handsome.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Plankton
programme.desc: SpongeBob falls victim to a scheme by the evil Plankton, Mr. Krabs' arch-rival with the Napoleon complex. Plankton hides out in SpongeBob's head and takes control of his brain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Someone's in the Kitchen With Sandy/ The Inside Job
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's fur to disguise himself as Sandy and get the Krabby Patty formula. Plankton goes inside SpongeBob's head to get the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Back to the Past / The Bad Guy Club for Villains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick travel back in time to see the young Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. The pair enjoy a classic Mermaidman and Barnacleboy episode.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: You Don't Know Sponge/ Tunnel of Glove
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squidward's School for Grown Ups/ Oral Report
programme.desc: When Pat suddenly grows a very grown-up beard, he decides it's time to act like a grown-up, too.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Jeanette's Secret Garden/ Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead.When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croner's basement, the Chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Rose by Any Other Name/ Queen Bee
programme.desc: Simon's experiment of how plants respond to positive or negative feedback creates a monster, and it is growing. Brittany's fear of bees turns into admiration when she's shrunk down to their size and experiences life as a bee.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Origami Tsunami/ Donnie’s Gifts
programme.desc: Our wannabe heroes try to solve the biggest little problem in the city. The Turtles have to fight their bad habits and a mutant chef.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shell in a Cell/ Minotaur Maze
programme.desc: Leo unseats Raph’s idol as pro wrestling champion of the world./ Beat the mutant maze in 30 minutes or less and the pizza is free.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Evil League of Mutants
programme.desc: Baron Draxum assembles of league of villains against the Turtles.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fast and the Furriest/ Mascot Melee
programme.desc: Donnie's newly built Turtle Tank goes missing. In order to get a birthday gift for Splinter, the Turtles have to take on thuggish Times Square Mascots.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shadow of Evil
programme.desc: As the TMNT work to lure Baron Draxum out, Splinter tries to get to the bottom of odd goings-on at April's new job.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Let Them Eat Crumbs/ Who Ghosts There
programme.desc: Eleanor has prepared a cake for a Bake-Off. But Brittany and Alvin come home and eat the cake without knowing its importance! Later, worried that Dave will move the family to his dream house, the boys make the house seem haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Girls Night Out/ Tables Turned
programme.desc: Dave discovers he's not too good at roughing it outdoors when he goes on a day hike with the Chipettes. When Alvin pranks Simon with a trick website making it look like Alvin is smarter, the chipettes prank Alvin back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Talking Teddy's Revenge/ Snail-a-Palooza
programme.desc: When Alvin thinks Theodore's teddy bear can tell the future, Alvin goes all out to make Talking Teddy his friend. Alvin lies to Theodore about a fake holiday to get out of chores, so Dave forces Alvin to make the holiday real.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pack Animal/ The Haunted Getaway
programme.desc: Dave tells Simon to throw out some stuff, and a few of his experiments end up in the wrong hands; Dave and the guys rent a cabin in the woods that might be haunted.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: 3, 2, 1/ Shirley Keeper
programme.desc: It's the day of the big rocket launch, and the entire city has Mars launch fever.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Buster/ Evil Layers
programme.desc: Buster Lloyd gets the opportunity to live out his fantasy of being a police officer. Duke DeTain and Shirley Keeper investigate the true identity of the Master Criminal.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Pteranodon't!
programme.desc: When a child becomes stranded in the Pteranodon aviary Own must make a daring rescue.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Christmas Everyday
programme.desc: The globe is put into gridlock after Timmy wishes for 365 days of Christmas a year.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Merry Wishmas!
programme.desc: When Timmy doesn't get what he wants for Christmas he simply wishes for it.

programme.title: Movie: A Fairly Odd Christmas
programme.desc: Timmy Turner is trying to grant kids' wishes, but he ends up causing kids' names to disappear off of Santa's good list. Timmy has to work with his childhood friend Tootie to make sure Christmas isn't ruined.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Christmas
programme.desc: Cricket becomes worried that he's not on Santa's 'Nice List' so he goes on a spree of good deeds. Gramma and Nancy go on a last minute search for Bill's gift.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Fright Before Creepmas
programme.desc: Mavis heads to the underworld to meet Krampus, hoping he can fix a thousand-year-old error that will allow Lydia to let everyone enjoy a family Creepmas.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda Holiday Special
programme.desc: Po is caught between his family traditions and Dragon Warrior duties when he is told he must host the Winter Feast at Jade Palace instead of decorating and serving with his father.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Christmas Vacation!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb want to show Santa how grateful they are for the work that he does every year at Christmas time by transforming the city of Danville into a giant shimmering thank you card and building a rest stop for Santa to relax in.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Phineas and Ferb Family Christmas
programme.desc: The boys decide to put on a traditional family Christmas special featuring their family, friends and guests. Featuring new holiday songs including: Buford and Baljeet sing 'Good King Wenceslas' and the whole gang sings 'We Wish You a Merry Christmas.'

programme.title: Toy Story That Time Forgot
programme.desc: During a post-Christmas play date, the gang finds themselves in uncharted territory when the coolest set of action figures ever turn out to be dangerously delusional. It's all up to Trixie the triceratops if the gang hopes to return to Bonnie's room.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Duck the Halls: A Mickey Mouse Christmas Special
programme.desc: Donald decides to stay home for the holidays instead of migrating somewhere warmer. To celebrate this special time, Mickey hopes to make Donald’s first Christmas the greatest ever.

programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fangceanera
programme.desc: Mavis is turning 115, so it's time for her Fangceanera. This vampire rite of passage means that she'll finally earn her Dracula cape. In order to do that, however, she must complete a dangerous mission.

programme.desc: The self-updating tome, The Monstroso Serioso, is on display at Hotel Transylvania. While looking at the book, Kitty Cartwright finds herself sucked into its pages. It's up to Mavis to retrieve Kitty by travelling into the past.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Sentencing a reformed Chicago gang member to death reveals corruption at every level of the criminal justice system.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: The execution-style killings of a Florida nightclub owner and two aspiring models are caught on camera.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Double Jeopardy
programme.desc: The wife and two children of an Air Force captain are murdered in Fayetteville, North Carolina, and Army sergeant Tim Hennis is sentenced to death for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Mother vs. Texas
programme.desc: A mother is charged and sent to Death Row for allegedly murdering her two young boys in their Dallas area home.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Memory of Murder
programme.desc: A small-time Ohio drug dealer sits on death row for murdering a family, until a rookie attorney unearths long-hidden case records that shed new light on the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Legendary Cape Lion
programme.desc: Forrest ventures home to Zimbabwe in search of the mysterious Cape Lion, a massive black-maned predator. He and the crew navigate the African bush determined to get DNA proof, facing threats of charging rhinos and huge prides of lions.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Caribbean Monk Seal
programme.desc: Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. To prove its existence, he and the crew descend into deep waters where they come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Madagascar Dwarf Hippo
programme.desc: Known for being a pint-size version of its African cousin, the Malagasy dwarf hippo has been written off as extinct for 1000 years. Forrest and a local biologist to trek through the bush of Madagascar to prove it still survives.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Hidden Turtle of Vietnam
programme.desc: In Vietnam, Forrest teams up with a conservation group to save the largest turtle species in the world from extinction. Using cutting edge technology, they attempt to find a suitor for the last and only surviving giant softshell.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Colombian Dinosaur
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Colombia, Forrest is on a mission to prove the Rio Apaporis Caiman still exists. Locals believe this crocodilian resides within a lawless land inhabited by guerilla rebels, kidnappers, and deadly predators.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Ivory Billed Woodpecker of the Bayou
programme.desc: Forrest is determined to find out if the famously reclusive Ivory Billed Woodpecker still exists. The alligator and poisonous snake infested swamps of Louisiana make for a challenging mission, but he is prepared for anything.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Unicorn and the Wolf
programme.desc: In Vietnam, Forrest treks through the world's largest cave searching for the Saola in a hidden oasis. Then, he heads home to California in search of the Southern Rocky Mountain wolf which hasn't been seen in almost 80 years.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Southern Rocky Mountain Wolf
programme.desc: The Southern Rocky Mountain wolf hasn't been seen in almost 80 years, but recent cattle attacks spark the possibility that is still exists. Trekking high into the Sierras, Forrest is determined to bring it out of hiding.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Movie: What's Love Got to Do With It?

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Belles
programme.desc: Two single best friends go after the same handsome pastor for a Christmas date.

programme.title: Movie: For the Love of Christmas
programme.desc: Husband and wife, Bryson and Sunday, have different views on family. When a homeless family shows up on their doorstep, Sunday has a change of heart.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.desc: A man believes that when a grandfather clock he has owned all his life stops, he will die.

programme.desc: A mother and daughter are divided over sharing a bedroom.
