programme.title: Love It or List It: Tree House Trouble
programme.desc: After looking at dozens of properties, Ken and Mark settled on a cabin-inspired home in the woods that was a foreclosure and needed lots of work. The couple had done DIY renos in the past and thought it would be an easy project, but it was not to be.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fan Faves: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.desc: Neither rain nor snow can stand in the way of the team at the clinic, but this year, the weather is putting them to the test.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Twist and Snout
programme.desc: In this enhanced episode, PVS has an exciting new addition to the clinic staff: Dr. Emily's husband, Tony.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dairy Queens
programme.desc: Not even snow and ice can stop the staff at Pol Veterinary Services from doing their jobs.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Frostbitten in the Mitten
programme.desc: The deep freeze of late winter has everyone feeling the chill, but Dr. Pol won’t let the temperature stop him from taking on a new home improvement project.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Color Purr-Pol
programme.desc: When Charles hears of a new technological breakthrough, he decides it’s time to give his partially colorblind father the greatest gift of all: the gift of color.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Un-Bee-lievable
programme.desc: The tough Michigan winter has finally broken, and local animals are abuzz in the warmer weather.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Pol Veterinary Services welcomes it newest member to the family.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Piggin' in the Rain
programme.desc: Gloomy weather doesn't stop Pol's crew from taking on a range of unique cases, including testy bulls, coughing pigs and wobbly reindeer.

programme.title: How It's Made: Tea; Roof Finials; Artificial Flowers; Alloy Wheels
programme.desc: On this episode of How it's Made: Tea; Roof Finials; Artificial Flowers; Alloy Wheels.

programme.title: How It's Made: Chains/ Bagels/ Vinyl Records
programme.desc: Join another exploration of familiar objects including chains, bagels and vinyl records.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Doomsday Mummies
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal dark secrets of the event that destroyed Pompeii.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Stone Age
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal secrets and ritual of the people who build the world's largest stone circle.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Leaning Tower of Pisa: The New Mystery
programme.desc: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is one of the world's most iconic buildings, and it's also the site of an 800-year-old mystery; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the archaeological evidence to reveal when it might finally fall over.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unearthed: Leaning Tower of Pisa: The New Mystery
programme.desc: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is one of the world's most iconic buildings, and it's also the site of an 800-year-old mystery; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the archaeological evidence to reveal when it might finally fall over.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The Dead Sea Scrolls are one of the Holy Land's greatest mysteries, but new discoveries might finally reveal the hidden meaning behind the strange texts, and as experts get closer to unmasking their author, they find clues of an ancient apocalypse.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Atlantis: The New Mystery
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Atlantis is not just a myth, but a real civilization devastated by an apocalyptic volcanic eruption, and now, experts use the latest science to unearth discoveries that might confirm the location of this mysterious lost city.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: The Deadly Mystery
programme.desc: Experts use the latest science and technology to reveal what Pompeii was like on the eve of its destruction, racing to uncover its last mysteries before Vesuvius erupts again.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Inside a Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Go inside the supermassive black hole that sits in the middle of our galaxy.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Voyager Mission
programme.desc: Voyager has had a profound effect on our knowledge of the cosmos. Its mission was supposed to last five years but remains ongoing, changing our understanding of the solar system. With contributions from key scientists, we explore what happens next.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of Jupiter
programme.desc: Recent discoveries by NASA's Juno mission reveal new secrets about Jupiter, a strange world that is more like a star than a planet. As scientists uncover what lies beneath its violent storms, our understanding of the solar system could change forever.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Journey to Alien Earths
programme.desc: New discoveries of alien earths reveal vital clues in finding extraterrestrial life, using the latest science and technology, experts reveal the strange landscapes and oceans of these distant worlds.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Pluto's Strange Secrets
programme.desc: NASA's mission to Pluto gathered the first close-up pictures of this strange and distant world, and now, new discoveries and the latest science reveal the secrets of its alien features, which could point to extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Journey to Saturn's Rings
programme.desc: New discoveries are changing everything we know about Saturn's rings, revealing that they're newer and more mysterious than we ever imagined, and that some day soon, they might disappear forever.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secret History of the Juno Mission
programme.desc: NASA's Juno mission is the closest we've ever explored Jupiter, and its incredible images reveal the gas giant's deepest secrets and how this deadly world helped create our solar system.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Tommy and his team are back on the trail of a dangerous fugitive who was convicted for armed robbery and assault, and was deported over ten years ago.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Roxanne's First Fugitive
programme.desc: Detective Roxanne Lopez has two conflicting tips about where a sexual offender may be.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Unthinkable
programme.desc: Officers search for a sex offender on the run, and aim to find him before sunrise.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Relentless
programme.desc: Detectives search for a 31-year-old male fugitive wanted for first-degree murder and weapons possession.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.desc: A twice convicted and particularly dangerous pedophile and sexual predator from Georgia is pursued before he hurts someone again.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Ticking Time Bomb
programme.desc: Detectives are assigned a parolee who's on the most wanted list, and perform a building-to-building search for the man.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: 15 Years Running
programme.desc: In 1993 a man was convicted of selling narcotics in South Carolina. He had already been incarcerated for a similar charge before and, not wanting to return to prison, failed to show up to serve his time.

programme.desc: A rising hip-hop star is gunned down in Orlando, Florida and detectives work around the clock to bring closure to the mourning parents.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?
programme.desc: A cheerleader vanished from Blanchester in 1996 and her boyfriend was convicted of murder.

programme.title: American Justice: The Doctor's Wife
programme.desc: An affair between a doctor and his nurse leads to the deaths of himself and his wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Those We Rely On
programme.desc: It's an emotional night on the Nightwatch in New Orleans as one EMS officer tells his partner that this is their last night on the job.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Family Ties
programme.desc: Family bonds and family struggles take center stage when a man approaches Robb and Bethany and asks them to help find his missing daughter whom he fears is dead. The ROC squad set up a high-profile sting to capture a group of thieves preying on Tampa.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: A car used to rob a large cache of assault rifles is found parked outside a house in a Dallas suburb; a sniper must call out a possibly armed and dangerous suspect from his home; but when a young boy comes out, all strategies must be changed.

programme.title: Betrayed: Beware the Au Pair
programme.desc: When Tara Lynn Grant, a 34-year-old mother of two goes missing, police can find no trace of her until a gruesome discovery turns the case into a statewide manhunt.

programme.title: Betrayed: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon admits she's struggled to find someone to take care of her. That's why she returned to school and landed a lucrative job. Sadly, though, one of her men will end her life just as this new chapter begins.

programme.title: Betrayed: Dying to be Popular
programme.desc: Becky Stowe is an eager 15-year-old looking for love. When she suddenly disappears, friends and family wonder if love finally found her, or if it was something far more sinister.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire
programme.desc: 34-year-old Paige Birgfeld is the ultimate multi-tasker - balancing four jobs, three kids, and two ex-husbands. No one realizes that beneath all this activity, Paige is also hiding a deep, dark secret that will eventually lead to an evil betrayal.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Stalker's Imagination
programme.desc: When Katerina leaves her husband, he fights back in imaginative ways to cause her pain, including getting Katerina locked up for a crime she hasn't committed. Katerina must do the unthinkable if she wants to escape forever.

programme.title: Before I Die: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: On June 23, 2008, Sharon Denson is found shot seven times and severely burnt. Her courage and strength in escaping the building and giving a dying declaration while she still could, ultimately lead to her murderer being caught and convicted.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Seven Minutes of Terror
programme.desc: After Michael Brinkman is murdered in his home, police are left to untangle the mystery of why the two masked home invaders stole nothing and left a series of strange clues at the crime scene.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Until We Meet Again
programme.desc: When James Henslee realized that he was the police's prime suspect, he couldn't believe it.

programme.title: Before I Die: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: On June 23, 2008, Sharon Denson is found shot seven times and severely burnt. Her courage and strength in escaping the building and giving a dying declaration while she still could, ultimately lead to her murderer being caught and convicted.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Seven Minutes of Terror
programme.desc: After Michael Brinkman is murdered in his home, police are left to untangle the mystery of why the two masked home invaders stole nothing and left a series of strange clues at the crime scene.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Until We Meet Again
programme.desc: When James Henslee realized that he was the police's prime suspect, he couldn't believe it.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Stalker's Imagination
programme.desc: When Katerina leaves her husband, he fights back in imaginative ways to cause her pain, including getting Katerina locked up for a crime she hasn't committed. Katerina must do the unthinkable if she wants to escape forever.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Going Postal
programme.desc: When US postal worker Kim accepts a ride to the Orange County fair from a quiet co-worker, she has no idea that she will become the center of a terrifying campaign of stalking, harassment, and obsession.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Southern Wild
programme.desc: When police announce that a spate of murders in a nearby town are the work of a serial killer, 36-year-old Collette Dwyer fears that the killer is the same man who has been stalking her.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Wishing Well Mystery
programme.desc: After Alyce Seff's body is found in a wishing well, the town of German Village, Ohio, is shocked to find the elderly landlady had as many enemies as she did friends. It will take police nine years to solve her case.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: A Deceitful Heart
programme.desc: When Michael Lee Smith's body is found shot, partially nude, and dumped on the side of the road, the town of Berkley, Michigan is scandalized. Police are forced to sift through lies and alibis as they attempt to track down the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: No Giving Up
programme.desc: When Marty finds his big brother Mike Rust's home in disarray with a motorcycle missing, the Saguache, Colorado, community leaves no stone unturned searching for one of their own. The case goes cold as years pass, but the local rumor mill heats up.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Death Before Marriage
programme.desc: Carol has been waiting 25 years to marry the love of her life, Jack Parkes. Six weeks away from their wedding in Kennedy Township, PA, she finds him shot in the head in their living room. The murder will destroy her life and uncover dark family secrets.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Nothing Random
programme.desc: An elderly couple in Moscow, Idaho, frantically perform CPR on their young neighbor after a pop of gunfire interrupts their bedtime routine. Investigators follow fresh footprints from the scene, only to learn the killer may already be behind bars.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Christmas Grave
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined for a New Mexico couple when they stumble across human remains while on a walk with their dogs. When police investigate, they rule Roxanne Houston's death a homicide.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 1: Missing
programme.desc: In October 1989, 10 year-old-Amy Mihaljevic is lured to a suburban Ohio shopping mall by an unknown man and is never seen again. A 30 year mystery and nationwide manhunt ensues, thousands of leads, hundreds of suspects, one killer still at large.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Overlord
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler faced a new threat. In the West, Allied preparations to invade northwest France were coming to a climax. It was an attack he had long been expecting. His problem was knowing when and where it would come.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Mediterranean and North Africa
programme.desc: Italy's dictator Benito Mussolini dreamt of recreating the Roman Empire. The Mediterranean would become Italy's lake with a great new colonial empire on its southern shore including British-controlled Egypt and Sudan.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Island War
programme.desc: By the spring of 1943, the Pacific war had reached a turning point. The United States had stopped the Japanese advance, now it launched a two-pronged attack to drive it back. To achieve this, the U.S. Navy had to pioneer new forms of warfare.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Klaus Barbie
programme.desc: The husband and wife team of Serge and Beate Klarsfeld worked tirelessly to have Nazi war criminal Klaus Barbie extradited from Bolvia to stand trail in France. Barbie, known as 'The Butch of Lyon', was responsible for the deaths of 10,000 French Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountaintop
programme.desc: A couple builds their off-grid dream home on a remote mountaintop overlooking the Southwest Montana backcountry. Together they've dreamed up a mountain base camp that's high tech and suits their outdoor lifestyle.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain Gear Is Going On
programme.desc: Chappie's team struggles to lift 600-pound rafters onto the cabin's roof. Then, Chris works on drying in his cabin while Jeff begins installing his cabin's windows.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game Changer
programme.desc: Jeff struggles with his front deck. Chappie's team finds a major error while building the exterior insulation and Chris Sewell runs out of building materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Toy Set For Big Kids
programme.desc: Chris gets some much needed help from family to work on his interior. A floatplane with engine problems brings Chappie's build site to a standstill and Jeff makes a critical error while building the water tank system for his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Knock This Thing Out
programme.desc: As winter barrels down on Alaska, the builders scramble to complete their heating systems. Chappie must climb an extremely tall ladder to cut a hole in his roof while Jeff and his friend Andy build a hearth and Chris fixes a leak in his chimney.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: As the final days of their builds approach, the builders work to complete their cabins. Jeff Erickson helicopters in the remaining furniture for his cabin, and Chris Sewell's team works hard through the night to get the interior floors installed.

programme.title: Building Alaska: End Game
programme.desc: At Point MacKenzie, Dave Poppert fights the cold and snow to finish his home in time for Thanksgiving dinner. Bruce Chambers lucks out when a friend comes to help put the finishing touches his Latouche Island cabin.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Tale of Two Houses
programme.desc: Nicole is back in action and juggling two Detroit houses at the same time. While the Ferndale house is in great shape, the 14 Mile property is gutted of its original fixtures and charm. Ferndale serves as the inspiration for renovations at 14 Mile.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Nicole tackles a 1920s house that used to be a rental and has incredibly small upstairs bedrooms. She plans to change the layout and add character, including removing a wall to make room for a new hallway and custom linen closet.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Miracle
programme.desc: Nicole finds that turning a tiny, dated bathroom into an en suite master bath isn't easy as she struggles to fit a soaking tub, shower and custom vanity in the space to give it stately, historic appeal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Maximizing the Master Suite
programme.desc: Nicole has almost completed the upstairs in her 14-Mile house. Now it's to time to unveil a bigger and brighter master bedroom. To get the look she wants, she has to knock down some walls, open up the ceiling and bring in a very special feature.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Matching Game
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis continues work on the den and powder room of her 1920s 14-Mile house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Blues
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis ventures down into the creepy basement of her 14-Mile project. She's then faced with a dilemma when an unforeseen turn of events threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cooking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole begins construction in the kitchen of the 14 Mile house. Working with a limited space and no original details, she is forced to attempt something she has never done before: an open kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Adding Style to 14 Mile
programme.desc: As the renovation of the 14 Mile house winds down, there's one more thing that needs to be done: finish the exterior. After repairing damage from a car accident, Nicole has a chance to bring back original details the house lost decades ago.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.desc: Quill must bust his father in order to save the Guardians from the ruthless Korvac.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man: Web Warriors: Nightmare on Christmas
programme.desc: Spider-Man sees what the world would be like without him when Nightmare takes the web-slinger on a journey through his past, present, and future.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: The Moon Knight Before Christmas
programme.desc: While house-sitting on Christmas Eve, Spider-Man is forced to team up with Moon Knight to defend the home from the new Mysterio.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: New Year's Resolution
programme.desc: With the help of a new team, the Avengers must reunite to save the universe.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: A Year Without Creepmas
programme.desc: Mavis confronts Krampus over slacking on the job and inadvertently gets him to take a vacation. Now she must team up with a strange bearded guy named Santa to save Creepmas.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Fright Before Creepmas
programme.desc: Mavis heads to the underworld to meet Krampus, hoping he can fix a thousand-year-old error that will allow Lydia to let everyone enjoy a family Creepmas.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Wendy's dad and Pedro's mom are getting married and Mavis has promised Hotel Transylvania will throw them the best wedding ever.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Stepmonsters/ Better Know Your Mavis
programme.desc: Mavis convinces Pedro and Wendy to get to know their new stepparents. Mavis' friends take care of her when she is sick.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: I Only Have Eyes for Goo/ Talk Blobbish To Me
programme.desc: Thanks to a cursed prescription, Wendy's new glasses allow her to read minds.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Holy Babies/ Aunt Lydia's New Clothes
programme.desc: Mavis fibs that it is her birthday to get an ice scream bar. After 500 years, Aunt Lydia's invisibility poncho arrives.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Portrait of Mavis As a Young Vampire/ Goo Crush
programme.desc: Mavis is so excited that she is finally getting her portrait hung in the Hall of Draculas. Wendy has never had a crush, so Mavis sets out to help her find one.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Creepover Party/ Frankenstein and Son
programme.desc: Crabby’s first winning streak leads to a sponsorship deal… with Plunderman Industries? Later Ace creates a Scrammer using Sloane’s cherished childhood plaything… to disastrous results.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Best Friends Furever/ Fantasy Vamp
programme.desc: Mavis promises to have a spa day with Wendy and have lunch with the werewolf twins at the same time. Mavis wins two tickets to the phlegm ball fantasy camp.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Northern Frights/ Don't Fear the Realtor
programme.desc: Uncle Gene's been invited to a performance of the Northern Frights! Maggie the ghostwriter is back and wants to sell Hotel Transylvania.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Song Remains Asleep/ Baby Got Hunchback
programme.desc: Aunt Lydia wants to replace the hotel's elevator music. Mavis and the gang uncover Quasimodo's secret recipe for dirt flambé.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Afterlifestyles of the Rich and Mavis/ The Mavysitters Club
programme.desc: Mavis and her friends put their ideas for the hotel into motion.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Duck the Halls: A Mickey Mouse Christmas Special

programme.title: Movie: The Road Home for Christmas

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: When Trucks Fly
programme.desc: Professional off-road racer RJ Anderson enlists Heavy D to trick out his brand new Ford Raptor and add some serious towing capacity. Meanwhile, the Diesel Brothers challenge the Goons Garage and Welder Up to a Tuff Truck rematch in Mesquite, Nevada.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Prepare for Liftoff
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers continue transforming their junkyard Bronco into an off-road beast for the Tuff Truck rematch against the Goons and Welder Up. Heavy D customizes a brand new UTV for his friend to break a world record at the live event.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Brothers Vs. The World
programme.desc: Get ready for a crazy night featuring an epic Blazer build, a wild race against a Lamborghini and a record breaking stunt. Then, a huge announcement with the Dirty Mudder Truckers.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Trucked Out: Blazer of Glory
programme.desc: Trucked Out with insider facts and extra scenes: The Diesel Brothers complete the ultimate diesel-powered party on wheels. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave convinces Heavy D to give his El Camino what she needs to get back on the road.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Don't Tread on Diesel
programme.desc: Heavy D puts the petal to the metal on his next SEMA build: a 6x6 with a custom full-track assembly that can handle any terrain in style. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave adds the finishing touches to his dream El Camino before revealing it at Monster Jam.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Head on a Spike
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 faces off with Adrenaline Rush, a team of MegaTruck All Stars. An intense crash leads to medics stepping in, and Spiker raises the stakes to double or nothing.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Shop Rod Rising
programme.desc: The DeBertis attempt to transform a classic van into a hot rod racing machine. Then, Brad gets practice with a hi-tech racing simulator but stumbles when it's time to compete in his next race.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Epic Fail of the Year
programme.desc: The Dieselsellerz pick up a vintage fire truck to transform into a tow truck that can carry everyone in the shop. Heavy D is determined to finish the endless Fail of the Year UTV build.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Don't Tread on Diesel
programme.desc: Heavy D puts the petal to the metal on his next SEMA build: a 6x6 with a custom full-track assembly that can handle any terrain in style. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave adds the finishing touches to his dream El Camino before revealing it at Monster Jam.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Head on a Spike
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 faces off with Adrenaline Rush, a team of MegaTruck All Stars. An intense crash leads to medics stepping in, and Spiker raises the stakes to double or nothing.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Shop Rod Rising
programme.desc: The DeBertis attempt to transform a classic van into a hot rod racing machine. Then, Brad gets practice with a hi-tech racing simulator but stumbles when it's time to compete in his next race.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Flippin' Diesel
programme.desc: The diesel brothers are up against the clock for their SEMA build: a replica Ford Bronco made from an F350 and an Excursion. Heavy D brings in physics help to make his dream of a somersaulting truck come true.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Storm's a-Brewing
programme.desc: A monster storm hits the Carolinas and Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom risk their lives to run a batch of shine. Nearby, Josh and Bill fall prey to the same storm when a flood threatens their underground still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Shiner's Last Stand
programme.desc: Tickle splits from Tim, recruits a new still hand and heads into the woods to scout a new site. Mark, Jeff and Jim Tom double down and begin work on a second still to run barley scotch while Deputy Sheriff Chuck infiltrates an active moonshine operation.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Prophecy Fulfilled
programme.desc: Tickle builds a new still and heads out on a midnight run and Josh goes ballistic when he damages the nearly completed underground still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Goes Rogue
programme.desc: Tickle goes it alone after his still hand Howard gets spooked by an intruder and disappears. Meanwhile, Josh and Bill discover toxic black mould in their underground still site, and Jeff's wife and son set up a second still to run barley scotch.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: An angry landowner busts Tickle, while Tim devises an ingenious new hiding spot for his backup stash of shine. Josh and Bill get into a bone-breaking fight at their new still site, and Mark bootlegs moonshine by canoe in the dead of night.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Adios, Mr. Still
programme.desc: Gunfire erupts in the bamboo patch just as Josh and Bill fire up their still for the first time this season. Meanwhile Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom run a batch of President George Washington's rye whiskey, and Tickle hits the skids when his still is sabotaged.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Tim hunts for 200 gallons of high-dollar, 60-year-old shine trapped at the bottom of a lake as Mark and Jeff encounter a bandit stealing their shine. Meanwhile, Mike and Tweedy bootleg shine under a pile of horse manure.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hat in Hand
programme.desc: In debt to dangerous people, Tickle goes to Tim for help as Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom do battle with an angry nest of yellow jackets trying to lay claim to their still site. Josh comes to Cutie Pie's rescue when she gets hurt at the underground still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Last Shiner Standing
programme.desc: In the season finale, one moonshiner goes down as Tickle devises a bold but risky plan to sell Tim's shine. Josh and Bill's still site is compromised, while Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom brazenly run three stills. Finally, Deputy Sheriff Chuck makes his move.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Delivery Time
programme.desc: Mark and Digger reflect back on one of their biggest batches ever. With a revolutionary still pot design and the help of Jim Tom, they crafted 150 gallons of brandy. Then, they have to figure out how to get it to their customers.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: With holiday cheer, Mark and Digger recall one of their favourite challenges, an impossible shine order they try to fulfill. Meanwhile, Lance and Jeff scramble when their bootlegger goes missing.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: In the holiday spirit, Mark and Digger revisit some memorable moments. In a surprising twist, Lance shows Jeff an unorthodox moonshine ingredient, while Patti and David risk a supersized mega run.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive - Most Extreme: Battle with Chaos
programme.desc: If they don't change their extreme hoarding, Jeff might lose the children he adores and Debbie may never have children at all.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive - Most Extreme: Surviving on Trash
programme.desc: Enter the shocking world of the most extreme hoarders that have been featured.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive - Most Extreme: Somewhere in My Pile
programme.desc: Beverly's clutter fills every last square inch of her home. Upstairs, her three beloved dogs have made the space absolutely unlivable. With the threat of the city condemning her home, Beverly must clear the hoard or risk losing everything.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: The Truth Shall Set You Free
programme.desc: Michael and Juliana discuss a potential prenup. Angela goes wedding gown shopping. Emily and Sasha arrive in the U.S. Robert and Anny go apartment hunting. Anna gives Mursel an ultimatum before their wedding. Natalie panics about Mike.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tania and Syngin struggle with communication. Juliana seeks independence. Religion divides Mike and Natalie. Mursel makes an important decision. Jasmin finds it hard to fit in. Anny's birthday gets wild. Angela hears news about Michael's visa.

programme.title: Unpolished: Come Home to Daddy
programme.desc: Lexi's creativity is pushed to the limit for her latest client's nails, but problems with technology threaten to make her experiment a failure. Bria and Matt arrive in Las Vegas to elope and the rest of the family slowly catches wind of their plan.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Did I Hear Someone Say $16,000?
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Race to the Altar
programme.desc: Rita is searching for the perfect 1940's style gown to match her theme. Natalie is searching for an untraditional gown that fits her full size frame.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You're Making Me Blush
programme.desc: Kara fell in love with a statement red dress at another salon, but her future mother-in-law has more traditional gown ideas. Sheena needs a colourful dress to wear to her Indian wedding reception. Later, Tamara tries on her dress for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father Knows Dress
programme.desc: Caitie and her wedding planner father do not see eye-to-eye on a gown. Danielle lost her mother to cancer, so Dad steps in to help her make the big decision. Chic Ciccarelli is back for her fitting, channelling her deceased father every step of the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Top My Dream Dress!
programme.desc: Three brides hope Kleinfeld can top the dream dresses they've already found. Lucille found a satin dress, but still wants more bling. Dana is head-over-heels for a tulle gown her mom hates. Joan loves a dress back home but wants one unique to Kleinfeld.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sexy Sells
programme.desc: Nik Wallenda pushes for his wife Erendira to choose a sexy gown – within limits! Amy returns for a dress that's even racier than her last one, but her twin still begs her to cover up. Jaya is hesitant to adhere to her fiancé's form fitting preference.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Performances Piece
programme.desc: Tony Danza makes his debut at the salon to help his Broadway co-star find the perfect bridal costume for her role in their new musical, 'Honeymoon in Vegas.' Ballerina Valerie wants a wedding gown that is nothing like her princess dance costumes.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: V.I.Pnina
programme.desc: Sometimes when Kleinfeld is closed the salon will specially open the doors for clients with unlimited budgets to have private appointments with their designers. Pnina Tornai meets individually with three budget-less brides for a record-breaking day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Vision Confusion
programme.desc: Lauren wants to look like a 'classy porn star' at her wedding, but she's in for a surprise. Bride Cheryl only knows what she does not want her wedding dress to look like. Bride Amanda hopes her custom gown lives up to the vision in her mind.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: My Sisters are Picking Out My Dress!
programme.desc: Arlicia is letting her opinionated sisters plan her entire wedding, including choosing her wedding dress. Ameena has an unlimited budget and bridezilla tendencies. Karen is especially thankful to be shopping today after nearly losing her fiancé.

programme.desc: On his birthday, Jake brings Amy to meet his mother, but a surprise appearance by his dad throws a wrench in his special day. Meanwhile, Rosa and Charles struggle with a new mandate regarding body cams.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The 9-8
programme.desc: The Nine-Nine host the detectives from the Nine-Eight, their neighbouring precinct, reuniting Jake with his old partner. Charles is immediately jealous and tries to reclaim his best friend status with Jake.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: House Mouses
programme.desc: When Jake insults Hitchcock and Scully's work ethic in the precinct, they force their way into one of his cases in attempt to prove themselves. Meanwhile, Amy and Gina help Rosa conquer one of her biggest fears, and Holt and Boyle work a celebrity case.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Adrian Pimento
programme.desc: When an unstable detective returns to the Nine-Nine after years undercover, Jake doesn't know what to make of him. Meanwhile, Charles' rebellious behavior pits him against the precinct's custodian.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Cheddar
programme.desc: Holt allows Amy and Jake to house-sit for him while he visits Kevin in Paris, but mayhem ensues when Holt's beloved dog, Cheddar, goes missing under their watch. Meanwhile, a romantic fling between Adrian Pimento and Rosa disrupts Terry and the others.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Terry Kitties
programme.desc: In an attempt to prove to his old precinct that he's not a joke, Terry enlists Jake's help in solving a case from his past. Meanwhile, Adrian moves in with Charles, with mixed results.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Paranoia
programme.desc: Rosa enlists Jake to help change Terry's disapproving opinion about her fast-moving relationship with Adrian Pimento. But their love for each other is put on hold when Pimento thinks someone from his past is trying to kill him.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Maximum Security
programme.desc: In an attempt to get information on a criminal operation, Amy has to go undercover at a women's prison and befriend one of the prisoners. Meanwhile back at the precinct, Holt and the team plan a fake funeral in an attempt to catch a hitman.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: On the Hot Seat
programme.desc: Chief Terry is under scrutiny by the City Council to get serious about his station's ratings, while his crew inadvertently puts his job in jeopardy by engaging in a ridiculous firehouse competition for a super sawft prize.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Cop Wars
programme.desc: Andy and Ike's misstep on a call to a Tacoma police officer's house fans the flames of the FD's long-standing feud with the PD. Chief struggles to keep a lid on the dispute.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Training Day
programme.desc: The Tacoma FD's negligence during a firehouse school trip makes Councilwoman Price so angry that she orders the guys to complete a training recertification with an old nemesis who's just itching to fail them.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The B-Team
programme.desc: Andy's big welcome from a different team of firefighters has him questioning his place within his own crew. Meanwhile, Eddie spars with a new top chef at the station to win the annual pancake cook-off.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Full Moon Fever
programme.desc: FD braces for a night of insane full moon rescue calls. Plus, Eddie and Grannie go on active appendage duty and Ike gets bitten into an altered state.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Old Flame
programme.desc: Eddie runs into his cradle-robbing first love and must decide whether to rekindle his romance with the sexy senior citizen. Then, Granny and Lucy compete to win the affections of an androgynous dispatcher and Terry discovers moisturizer.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Where's the Beefcake
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tries to take nudity out of the annual Firefighters' Beefcake Calendar and the crew must get creative to maintain the integrity of its sexy (and oily) tradition.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: South Africa's Legendary Beast
programme.desc: A recent sighting in South Africa of a bizarre beast - half human, half fish - draws Jeremy into the story of creature with ancient origins and a fearsome reputation.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Toxic Invader
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the disappearance of fish in Australia's Fitzroy River. Evidence points to the arrival of a new top predator, but it could be something far more insidious spreading into Western Australia.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Jurassic River Beast
programme.desc: Tasmania is home to species found nowhere else on earth, including a colossal freshwater beast capable of breaking a person's arm. Jeremy Wade will venture into the island's dense, eerie forests in search of this formidable creature.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Cold Water Mystery
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to investigate reports of strange, alien species in the water surrounding the remote Aleutian Islands.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: How to Catch a River Monster: Alaskan Angler Mystery
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade ventures to Alaska to track down the disappearing king salmon. Along the way, he treks through native villages and encounters a grizzly as he hunts for clues to explain the dwindling numbers of his magnificent fish.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: How to Catch a River Monster: Swedish Monster
programme.desc: Folktales of human-sized pike have frightened Europe's locals for generations. Jeremy Wade is determined to catch one of these ancient monsters in an epic search that takes him from the lakes of Ireland to Sweden's Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: How to Catch a River Monster: Trouble Down Under
programme.desc: Jeremy heads down under to search for a killer who is annihilating the fish in Australia's Fitzroy River. Key details target a predator of interest but the truth could be far worse and spreading throughout Western Australia.

programme.title: River Monsters: Rapids: Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy investigates terrifying reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys, a beast so violent that it slices through flesh and even breaks bones.

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Sacred Grounds
programme.desc: After surviving mother nature's devastation, the residents of Tanana face a new threat: an invasion of tourist hunters that are killing valuable game.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens in Wonderland
programme.desc: Tabby kittens and a bearded dragon, a group of Burmese kittens go on an adventure and the runt of a litter of Siberian kittens plays with a miniature horse.

programme.title: Too Cute!: #Merrycuteness
programme.desc: Celebrate the miracle of cute with this festive treat, set to beloved holiday classics and sure to warm hearts and homes during the holiday season.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Professor Clovis and the Hamburglar
programme.desc: The rescue receives two new residents - Professor Clovis, a miniature schnauzer with a suspected liver shunt who needs a complicated and costly surgery and Hamburglar, a blind puppy who Amanda prepares for his new forever family.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Pit-Bull and Panda
programme.desc: Amanda works with Tia of Pit Bulls and Parolees to rescue a three-legged shepherd mix as part of a road trip rescue mission. She picks up 16 dogs along the way, including a young lab with a brain issue and a puppy mill survivor.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Aloha Dog Rescue
programme.desc: Amanda and her kids travel to Hawaii, where they meet dogs perfect for Panda Paws: a deaf mother-daughter Catahoula duo, Loco Moco, a puppy who may be blind and Super Scootie, a senior in need of a home after years of neglect.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Super Scootie the Super Senior
programme.desc: Amanda finds forever homes for her Hawaiian rescues. Super Scootie has malformed legs among other problems and Loco Moco struggles to process visual cues. A new rescue arrives Lily Rose, a blind and overweight toy spaniel.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: It's Raining Cats!
programme.desc: Felines take over when Amanda helps an energetic kitten facing euthanasia after breaking his leg for a second time, along with a tiny kitten born with malformed front legs. A three-legged husky-rottweiler puppy needs a forever home.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Happily Everly After
programme.desc: A member of Amanda's TV crew wants to adopt a Frenchie who lived her entire life in a puppy mill. Cupid, a lab mix puppy, needs daily physical therapy for a brain disorder, and a pittie from Amanda's past needs emergency surgery.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: All Paws on Deck
programme.desc: Amanda faces one of her most challenging rescues when a puppy arrives with serious neurological issues. Panda Paws helps a Chihuahua terrier mix bounce back after only having the use of one leg before finding him a forever family.

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue: Frenchie Fix
programme.desc: Amanda teams up again with Tia of Pit Bulls and Parolees to help Aiden, a Great Dane mix with a brain issue. Then, she meets Chickpea, a French bulldog with a medical condition that quickly turns into a life or death situation.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Contacts

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cranes, Sprains and Automobiles
